data.acceptance:
1. Prefix stripping uses the last hyphen (rfind/rindex) rather than the first when locating the split point.
2. A project named "feature-builder" with a knot like "feature-builder-123" strips to "123", not "builder-123".
3. Single-segment project names (no hyphens) continue to strip correctly.
4. Existing tests pass and new tests cover multi-hyphen project names.
